Shadow is the best — One of, if not, THE most special bulls in G.U.N. He was even called the golden bull! A nickname he was proud to have.

The only thing Shadow wasn't proud of was the fact that he was in a breeding program and didn't breed. That was frustrating, not having a partner, a companion to call his own. Shadow had a nice appearance, strong genes, damn it! He should be able to find a mate...

Well. Maybe you can help him with this issue!
